task_completion.description: Cover page is created with the required text and formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a cover page with 3 centered lines: 'City of Millbrook Department of Public Utilities' (largest, bold), 'Annual Water Quality Report', and 'Calendar Year 2025'.

task_completion.description: An auto-generated Table of Contents is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents block that lists the document's headings with page numbers.

task_completion.description: The 7 required sections are present and styled as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the headings: Source Water Information, Water Treatment Process, Detected Contaminants, Violations & Explanations, Health Information, How to Participate, Contact Information. They should be styled prominently (Heading 1).

task_completion.description: A 7-column table is created for Detected Contaminants with specific formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table with 7 columns and a bold header row. It should contain 8 data rows (Barium, Fluoride, Nitrate, Copper, Lead, TTHM, HAA5, Turbidity). The row for 'Lead' must be formatted in bold italic.

task_completion.description: All draft notes marked [REMOVE] are deleted from the narrative.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the body text to ensure no text enclosed in brackets starting with '[REMOVE:' is visible.

task_completion.description: Footer is added and body text is formatted correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a footer containing 'City of Millbrook -- CCR 2025' and a page number. The body text should be in a serif font and justified.

task_completion.description: The document is saved as millbrook_ccr_2025.odt on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the word processor's title bar or the Desktop file manager to confirm the file name is 'millbrook_ccr_2025.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to compile the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for LibreOffice Writer or a similar word processor interface being used to format the text and insert the table.

integrity.description: The agent opened the source files to extract the content.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for windows or tabs showing 'lab_results_2025.odt', 'ccr_narrative_sections.odt', and 'epa_ccr_format_guide.txt' being opened and read.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass manual GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing python or bash scripts generating the .odt file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final document must be named 'millbrook_ccr_2025.odt' on the Desktop. The cover page must have 3 centered lines: 'City of Millbrook Department of Public Utilities' (18pt bold), 'Annual Water Quality Report' (16pt), 'Calendar Year 2025' (14pt). An auto-generated Table of Contents is required. There must be exactly 7 sections with Heading 1: Source Water Information, Water Treatment Process, Detected Contaminants, Violations & Explanations, Health Information, How to Participate, Contact Information. The Detected Contaminants table must have 7 columns and 8 data rows (Barium, Fluoride, Nitrate, Copper, Lead, TTHM, HAA5, Turbidity). The table header row must be bold, and the Lead row must be bold italic (as it is the only violation). All 6 [REMOVE] notes must be deleted. The footer must have 'City of Millbrook -- CCR 2025' on the left and page number on the right. Body text must be 12pt serif justified, with 1-inch margins.
